strategic_narrative: Mojo's Take: CPL for Meta Ads has significantly improved to ₹365, indicating a potential path to efficiency, but pacing at only 26% means you're at risk of missing targets. Focus on ramping up spend to optimize for conversions and maintain momentum before hitting the end of the month.

health_signals: Creative running 51 days [CRITICAL] but performance score 75.0/100 — PERFORMING_WELL, no refresh needed.
[VIDEO] Thumb-stop 22.3% < 25% target. Fix first 3s: add motion/contrast/face.

active_playbooks.title: CPM Cost Increases — Auction & Creative Fix
actions: Refresh first 3 seconds of videos (movement, emotion, contrast)
Add fresh UGC-style creatives (native looking, not ad-like)
Use brighter non-Facebook colors (yellow, red, orange vs blue/grey)
Pause underperforming ads (CPM up + CTR down)
Split-test placement (exclude Audience Network if CTR < 0.5%)

active_playbooks.title: CTR Drop Recovery — Hook & Messaging Refresh
diagnosis: Compare CTR across creatives to identify drops by asset
Check placement breakdown (IG Reels, FB Feed, Story)
actions: Change primary text: add value-driven hook or problem statement
Make offer + CTA visible in first two lines of ad copy
Use emotional triggers: FOMO, urgency, social proof, scarcity
Rework thumbnail for Reels/videos (clean, bright, no clutter)
Add headline overlays on videos (price, USP, offer)
A/B test creatives by format (Reel vs Static vs Carousel)
Ensure ad doesn't 'look like an ad' (raw, UGC, casual)

active_playbooks.title: Thumb Stop Recovery — First 3 Seconds Fix
diagnosis: Check video size/aspect ratio mismatch (cropped on feed?)
Compare thumb-stop by audience and placement
actions: Add motion within first 1 second (pan, zoom, text slide-in)
Use face or eyes (human presence increases scroll-stops)
Add headline overlays on first frame ('3BHK | ₹1.35Cr | Ready 2025')
Use pattern interrupts (camera shakes, cuts, quick zooms)
Test UGC hooks ('POV: You finally find a 3BHK with 3 balconies')
Try native feel (looks like a reel, not an ad)

Bottom 1 ads: avg CPL ₹965, CTR 1.65%, CPM ₹1327, Freq 1.20

recommendations.category: CPL Cost Spiral — Form, Audience & Creative Triage
recommendations.detail: CPL ₹965 > ₹936 alert (target ₹720 × 1.3). 2 possible root causes identified.

root_causes.solution: Expand audience: add nearby geo, broaden Advantage+ signals, test new interest signals.

root_causes.evidence: Verify optimization is set to 'Leads', not 'Form Opens' or 'View Content'
root_causes.solution: Check ad set optimization event. Ensure it targets highest-value conversion (lead submission).

recommendations.category: Thumb Stop Recovery — First 3 Seconds Fix
recommendations.action: Fix first 3 seconds on 1 video ads
recommendations.detail: Video ads with TSR < 25%: Pre_EMI_Joyita_&_Veda_Vid. Add motion at 0-1s, use face/eyes, headline overlay, pattern interrupts.
Score: 80.0/100, CPL: ₹328 (within target), 33 leads. SOP: Scale max 25%.
Campaign has 33 leads (need ~50/week for stable learning). Budget: ₹2000/day.

root_causes.evidence: Check if multiple adsets compete for same audience
root_causes.solution: Consolidate similar adsets into one to pool conversions.
